negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_472f4b07-6905-4737-962d-383f6e014d9f
prompt: A scenic clip captures a man riding his bike along a two-way cycling path in a picturesque mountainous landscape. The camera follows him from behind, moving randomly as he pedals along the path, which runs parallel to a two-way highway on its right. In this eye-level wide shot, the man is wearing a dark t-shirt, shorts, sneakers, and a head covering, with a small, dark-colored backpack slung over his shoulders. Two cyclists pass by from the opposite direction on the same path; the first is wearing a black short-sleeve shirt and shorts, while the second is in a white and blue cycling shirt with black shorts, both on bright orange bikes with thin, dark wheels. On the left side of the frame, a wire fence separates the cycling track from a forest filled with tall pine trees. Between the fence and the path is a short line of rocks piled on one another with green vegetation sticking out toward the trail. On the right side of the paved biking trail, a concrete barrier divides the path from the highway, where cars frequently pass in both directions. Between the barrier and the trail is a darker patch of land with green vegetation lining the path. A long green median runs along the center of the highway, separating the two directions of traffic. To the right of the far lane, there are two rows of tall pine trees separated by a tan formation where the second row of pines can be seen in the distance. The scene is enveloped by a breathtaking natural landscape and a majestic mountain range on the left that forms a striking background under a blue sky dotted with fluffy clouds. The whole scene is bathed in bright daylight, enhancing the clarity of the foreground and the depth of the background. The ambiance suggests a tranquil yet invigorating activity amidst stunning natural beauty, embodying the essence of outdoor exploration.
